name: waterloo-course-tools
description: Codex skills for UWaterloo Learn/Brightspace, Piazza, and course due-date workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch UWaterloo Learn materials, Piazza posts, and course due dates
interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex skills for Waterloo students to sync Learn/Brightspace materials, discover external course pages, check Piazza posts through browser-use, and add confirmed due dates to Apple Calendar.
defaultPrompt: Sync my UWaterloo Learn course materials.
Find due dates in my synced Learn materials.
